title: OLEDcraft
body:
![OLEDcraft Logo](https://ewanhowell.com/assets/images/resourcepacks/oledcraft/logo.webp)
## The Darkest Minecraft Dark Mode
[View the pack on my website!](https://ewanhowell.com/resourcepacks/oledcraft)




This pack is a Minecraft Dark Mode like no other! This pack aims to make the Minecraft UI as dark as possible. Features: - Dark Menu Background - Dark Menu Buttons - Dark Inventory - Dark Hotbar all while keeping the vanilla style.
